pkgmetadata.longdescription: Metric Reporting Python Package for CloudML Hypertune Helper Functions for CloudML Engine Hypertune Services... _Google CloudML Engine Hyperparameter Tuning Service httpscloud.google.comml-enginedocstensorflowhyperparameter-tuning-overviewpypi versionsPrerequisites-------------- Google CloudML Engine Overview httpscloud.google.comml-engine__.- Google CloudML Engine Hyperparameter Tuning Overview httpscloud.google.comml-enginedocstensorflowhyperparameter-tuning-overview__.Installation------------Install via pip httpspypi.python.orgpypipip__ pip install cloudml-hypertuneUsage-----.. code python import hypertune hpt hypertune.HyperTune() hpt.report_hyperparameter_tuning_metric( hyperparameter_metric_tagmy_metric_tag, metric_value0.987, global_step1000)By default, the metric entries will be stored to tmphypertuneoutout.metric in json format {global_step 1000, my_metric_tag 0.987, timestamp 1525851440.123456, trial 0}Licensing---------- Apache 2.0.. pypi image httpsimg.shields.iopypivcloudml-hypertune.svg target httpspypi.orgprojectcloudml-hypertune.. versions image httpsimg.shields.iopypipyversionscloudml-hypertune.svg target httpspypi.orgprojectcloudml-hypertune
